prompt:
In home/hyprland.nix, change the scrolling layout column_width from "0.333" to "0.3" to leave room for gaps on an ultrawide monitor with 3 columns.

Also update explicit_column_widths to include 0.3 instead of 0.333:
  Change from: "0.25, 0.333, 0.4, 0.5, 0.667, 1.0"
  Change to:   "0.25, 0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.667, 1.0"

Run nix fmt and verify the build before creating a PR.
